task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the SciNote dashboard or interface, indicating successful login with the provided admin credentials.
The SciNote global search bar or project search contains the query 'Vorinostat', or a search results page is visible showing hits for this compound.

task_completion.description: Identify the unique parent Experiments from the search results
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks into the search results or views breadcrumb trails/hierarchy to determine the parent Experiment names for the items containing 'Vorinostat'.

task_completion.description: Open a text editor to create the output file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, VS Code) is open with the file path /home/ga/Documents/vorinostat_experiments.txt.

task_completion.description: List the unique names of the identified Experiments
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor contains exactly three lines with the names: 'Vorinostat Efficacy Study VR-01', 'PK Profile - Group 4', and 'Toxicity Screening 2024'.
The text editor shows no unsaved changes indicator (e.g., no asterisk next to the filename), or a terminal window displays the saved file contents using a command like 'cat'.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to interact with SciNote
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser being used to navigate SciNote, rather than terminal commands or API scripts bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Agent actually searched for the compound instead of guessing
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual proof of the search results page for 'Vorinostat' being loaded and viewed before the text file was created.

integrity.description: Agent did not hallucinate or add extra experiments
integrity.visual_evidence: The final text file contains ONLY the three expected experiment names, with no additional fabricated entries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/vorinostat_experiments.txt. The exact names of the expected parent Experiments that must be listed in the file are: 'Vorinostat Efficacy Study VR-01', 'PK Profile - Group 4', and 'Toxicity Screening 2024'.
